meta.title: Sures Guragai — Finance & Audit Professional
meta.description: Sures Guragai – CA Finalist (ICAI). Finance & audit professional offering accounting, bookkeeping, audit support, and taxation services in Nepal.
meta.keywords: Sures Guragai, CA Nepal, Finance Professional, Audit, Bookkeeping, VAT, TDS, Financial Reporting
meta.author: Sures Guragai

hero.desc: Seven years across statutory audit, reconciliation, bookkeeping, and taxation — in Nepal and India. Currently Finance Solutions Officer at Nepal Works. CA Final Group I cleared, January 2026.

about.heading: A finance professional who gets the details right
paragraphs: I am Sures Guragai, a Kathmandu-based finance and audit professional with over seven years of hands-on experience in auditing, accounting, compliance, financial reconciliation, and finance operations.

facts.val:
CA Final · Group I Passed (Jan 2026)
Group II Ongoing
IPCC Groups I & II · CPT · B.Com (IGNOU)

services.title: Accounting & Bookkeeping
services.desc: Accurate, well-organised records that keep your business in control and audit-ready.

services.title: Taxation Support
services.desc: End-to-end tax compliance for individuals and businesses — from return filing to obtaining your tax clearance certificate.

services.title: Audit Support
services.desc: Thorough audit assistance from planning to reporting, across multiple industries.

services.title: Financial Reporting
services.desc: Clear financial statements and reports for informed stakeholder decision-making.

services.title: Compliance & Regulatory
services.desc: Helping organisations meet statutory obligations and avoid compliance risk.

services.title: Internal Control Support
services.desc: Identifying gaps and strengthening controls to protect your organisation's assets.

services.title: Financial Analysis & Budgeting
services.desc: Analytical support to plan, forecast, and evaluate financial performance.

services.title: Commission Calculation
services.desc: Accurate commission validation and reconciliation for complex payout structures.

services.title: Business Advisory
services.desc: Practical financial guidance for start-ups and SMEs building sound foundations.

bullets.text: Handle commission calculation and validation to support accurate and timely financial processing.
Monitor ledgers and financial records to identify discrepancies and maintain data accuracy.
Manage financial data requirements and support timely reconciliation across operational workflows.
Strengthen day-to-day control and reporting discipline across finance operations.

experience.title: Assistant Auditor
experience.company: Trust Haven Professional · Lazimpat, Kathmandu, Nepal

bullets.text: Performed statutory audits for clients across engineering, nonprofit, restaurant, securities, and service sectors.
Prepared VAT and TDS returns; supported accounting, bookkeeping, and cost sheet preparation.
Contributed to internal audit engagements and company incorporation support work.
Key clients: Paragon Engineering, Center for Autism, Kantipur Job Solution, Pork Hub Restaurant, Haleshi Securities.

experience.title: Articled Audit Assistant
experience.company: Gaur & Company · Laxmi Nagar, New Delhi, India

bullets.text: Supported statutory, management, and operational audits for banks, hospitals, automobile dealerships, and electronics businesses.
Handled vouching and verification, audit of statutory liabilities, and account finalisation support.
Reviewed loans and advances; checked NPA-related records in banking audit assignments.

experience.title: Articled Audit Assistant
experience.company: M. Sippy & Associates · Sector 16, Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

bullets.text: Assisted with GST and TDS return filing, tax audit support, and compliance documentation.
Provided support for bookkeeping, account finalisation, and client audit assignments.

blog.title: Understanding VAT Compliance for Small Businesses in Nepal
blog.excerpt: A practical guide to VAT registration thresholds, return filing timelines, and common compliance pitfalls small business owners face.

blog.title: What Internal Audit Can Do Beyond Compliance
blog.excerpt: Internal audit is more than a checkbox. Explore how an effective function adds real business value by improving controls and risk management.

blog.title: Clearing CA Final Group I While Working Full-Time
blog.excerpt: A candid look at balancing professional work and CA exam preparation — with strategies that helped me pass Group I in January 2026.

testimonials.quote: Sures has a strong grasp of financial reconciliation and always ensures ledger accuracy is maintained. His attention to detail and follow-through make him a dependable member of the finance team.
testimonials.name: Niroj Shrestha

testimonials.quote: He handled our statutory audit work with professionalism and thoroughness. VAT and TDS filings were always completed on time, and he communicated any issues clearly without delay.
testimonials.name: Pawan Sigdel

testimonials.quote: A reliable and knowledgeable finance professional. Sures helped us set up our bookkeeping systems and prepare our accounts in a structured way from the very beginning.
testimonials.name: Anil Nepal

contact.heading: Let's work together
contact.intro: Available for freelance engagements, consulting work, and full-time opportunities. Reach out via the form or directly using the details below.
